zh.Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England: 英國爾麗頓 白 內斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當David De Malpas於大約1341年出生在英國爾咸頓時，他的父親David de Malpas58歲，母親Catherine Egerton43歲。他和Katherine Bickerton至少有2個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1430年在英國享年90歲。

zh-hans.Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England: 英国爾麗頓 白 內斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David De Malpas于大约1341年出生在英国爾咸頓时，他的父亲David de Malpas58岁，母亲Catherine Egerton43岁。他和Katherine Bickerton至少有2个儿子和6个女儿。他去世于1430年在英国享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Malpas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Malpass
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Gloucestershire): habitational name, chiefly from either of two places called Malpas (Cheshire, England and Monmouthshire, Wales); perhaps also occasionally from other minor places so called in England (e.g. in Berkshire, Cornwall, and Yorkshire) or from various places called Malpas or Maupas in France. The placenames derive from Old French mal ‘bad’ + pas ‘passage’.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When David De Malpas was born about 1341, in Hampton, Cheshire, England, his father, David de Malpas, was 58 and his mother, Catherine Egerton, was 43. He had at least 2 sons and 6 daughters with Katherine Bickerton. He died in 1430, in England, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David De Malpas est né environ 1341, à Hampton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, David de Malpas, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Catherine Egerton, avait 43 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles avec Katherine Bickerton. Il est décédé en 1430, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als David De Malpas um 1341 in Hampton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater David de Malpas 58 und seine Mutter Catherine Egerton 43. Er hatte mit Katherine Bickerton mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1430 im Alter von 90 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David De Malpas è nato il circa 1341 nel Hampton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, David de Malpas, aveva 58 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Egerton, aveva 43 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie con Katherine Bickerton. Morì nel 1430, nel England, all'età di 90 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: David De Malpasが約1341年にイギリスチェシュアイアハンプトンで生まれた時，父David de Malpasは58歳，母Catherine Egertonは43歳であった。彼はKatherine Bickertonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1430年にイギリスで90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: David De Malpas(이)가 대략 1341년 영국 체실르 함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David de Malpas(은)는 58세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Egerton(은)는 43세였다. 그는 Katherine Bickerton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1430년 영국에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David De Malpas nasceu aproximadamente 1341, em Hampton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, David de Malpas, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Egerton, tinha 43 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas com Katherine Bickerton. Ele faleceu em 1430, em Inglaterra, com 90 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David De Malpas родился около 1341 г. в местности хамптон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени David de Malpas было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Egerton, 43. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей от Katherine Bickerton. Он умер в 1430 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 90 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David De Malpas nació aproximadamente 1341, en Hampton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, David de Malpas, tenía 58 años y su mamá, Catherine Egerton, tenía 43 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas con Katherine Bickerton. Murió en 1430, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 90 años.
